title: pelargonium × trifurcatum
intro: Pelargonium × trifurcatum, also known as Honey Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its trifurcated leaf and distinctive fragrance. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium × trifurcatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
